summary: Iteration 4 frontend-only test for Supabase auth wiring. All 8 review requirements PASS. Supabase signUp / signInWithPassword / signInWithOAuth are now genuinely wired (network traffic confirmed to nkqbufrmsdmyoqnodwly.supabase.co). RequireAuth route guard works. No traces of the old 'Auth backend not connected yet' or 'Google sign-in/up placeholder' toast strings.

tests_executed.name: Landing / loads
tests_executed.detail: Page renders, 'ConsCalc' visible, no regressions observed

tests_executed.name: /dashboard unauthenticated → /login redirect
tests_executed.detail: RequireAuth Navigate(/login) triggers; data-testid=login-form visible after redirect

tests_executed.name: Login empty submit error toast
tests_executed.detail: Sonner error: 'Email and password are required.'

tests_executed.name: Login invalid creds → Supabase call + error toast
tests_executed.detail: POST https://nkqbufrmsdmyoqnodwly.supabase.co/auth/v1/token?grant_type=password → 400; sonner toast 'Invalid login credentials'. NO old placeholder text.

tests_executed.name: Signup empty submit
tests_executed.detail: Toast: 'Fill out all fields to continue.'

tests_executed.name: Signup unchecked terms
tests_executed.detail: Toast: 'Please agree to the terms first.'

tests_executed.name: Signup password < 6
tests_executed.detail: Toast: 'Password must be at least 6 characters.'

tests_executed.name: Signup valid (random email)
tests_executed.detail: POST https://nkqbufrmsdmyoqnodwly.supabase.co/auth/v1/signup; redirected to /dashboard (Supabase project has email confirmation disabled → session returned immediately, matching valid outcome (b)). No old placeholder.

tests_executed.name: Google OAuth (login + signup)
tests_executed.detail: login-google click triggered signInWithOAuth which navigated to https://nkqbufrmsdmyoqnodwly.supabase.co/auth/v1/authorize?provider=google&redirect_to=...&%2Fdashboard. No old 'Google sign-in placeholder' toast.

critical_code_review_comments: supabaseClient.js throws synchronously at module load if env vars are missing — fine for dev but will white-screen the whole app in prod if a deploy ever ships without the keys. Consider rendering a friendlier fallback or surfacing via an error boundary.

Signup redirect logic in pages/Signup.jsx relies on data?.session to decide redirect to /dashboard vs /login. If Supabase email-confirmation policy is later turned ON in the dashboard, the 'Check your email' branch is already implemented — no action needed today, just be aware.

Auth Google redirect_to currently uses window.location.origin + nextPath. Make sure that URL is whitelisted in Supabase Auth → URL Configuration → Redirect URLs, otherwise Google OAuth callback will fail with redirect_uri_mismatch.
user.email may not be available on user_metadata.full_name fallback chain in Dashboard.jsx — acceptable for now since real-name is captured in signUp metadata.
test_credentials: None required. /app/memory/test_credentials.md is now STALE — it still says 'no real authentication backend' and lists the old placeholder toast text. Main agent should update it to reflect that real Supabase auth is wired and that signup requires a unique email.
seed_data_creation: Created one throwaway Supabase auth user during test 6 with email pattern qa+<timestamp>@conscalc-test.local (immediate-session, no email confirmation). Will not interfere with future tests since email is timestamped.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supabase project has email confirmation DISABLED — signup returns a session immediately and routes to /dashboard. If user later flips confirmation ON in the Supabase dashboard, the signup-success path will switch to the 'Check your email' branch and redirect to /login — both are valid per spec. Google OAuth is reachable but the OAuth provider config in Supabase is unknown; clicking the button does navigate to Supabase /auth/v1/authorize?provider=google so the wiring is correct. Update /app/memory/test_credentials.md before next iteration.
